events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: American singer, actress, and businesswoman Jennifer Lopez was born on July 24, 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo's Enduring Reign
angles.copy: From Fly Girl to global superstar, Jennifer Lopez turns 57 today! What's your favourite J.Lo track or movie moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter and lead vocalist of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with its first music video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: The Day The Music Video Was Born
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever with its very first broadcast. Remember the moment 'Video Killed The Radio Star' hit your screen?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Masterpiece
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and introduced us to a new era of rock and roll. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, defining a generation with peace, love, and music.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, hundreds of thousands gathered for Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in music history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: August 16th marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the one and only Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, in the UK.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer-songwriter and frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting continue to rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter, best known as the lead vocalist of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that iconic swagger to the stage.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: First iPod Announced 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod, revolutionising portable music, on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple announced the iPod – remember when 1,000 songs in your pocket felt like magic?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating the enduring legacy of 007 and his timeless adventures on screen.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter, co-founder of The Beatles, and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, screenwriter, and a founding member of Monty Python, John Cleese, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the inimitable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' Turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: Experimental Masterpiece
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered their groundbreaking 'White Album'. A double LP full of diverse and experimental tracks.
